description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, running a global before_script that executes `docker info` and logs in to the registry with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`. Define variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, PRODUCTION_IMAGE, and STAGING_IMAGE based on $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE and set stages build, test, release, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE .` then `docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE`. In the test stage add test and test-lint jobs that each pull the test image and run `docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE npm run test` or `npm run lint` respectively. In the release stage add a release-image job (only on master) that pulls, tags to $PRODUCTION_IMAGE and pushes it, and a stage-image job (only on development) that pulls, tags to $STAGING_IMAGE and pushes it; finally, in the deploy stage add a rancher-upgrade job (only on master, allow_failure) that makes the script executable, installs curl via `apk --no-cache add curl`, and calls `./tools/rancher-upgrade.sh $WEBHOOK_MASTER_URL`.
